title: Building with Anthropic's Fable 5 LIVE - Is It Really Worth the Hype?
summary: Cole Medin conducts a live stream testing Anthropic's Fable 5, examining whether the model's capabilities justify its 2x price premium over Opus 4.8. The stream puts the model through real-world tasks to assess its practical value proposition.
writeup: Cole Medin runs a live stream that tests Anthropic's Fable 5 on real-world tasks to gauge its practical value. The central question is whether the model's capabilities justify a 2x price premium over Opus 4.8. The framing is a cost-benefit analysis: capability gains weighed against the higher per-use cost.
